ddls:
CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "mission_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission */,
  "faction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faction the mission is available for */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the mission (e.g., WEEKLY, DAILY, HEROIC 4) */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward associated with the mission */,
  "reputation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reputation item associated with the mission */,
  "how_to_get" TEXT /* Instructions on how to complete the mission */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the mission can be initiated */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the mission (e.g., EASY, MEDIUM, HARD) */,
  "xp_reward" INTEGER /* Experience points earned from completing the mission */,
  "required_level" INTEGER /* Minimum level required to attempt the mission */,
  "start_npc" INTEGER /* ID of the NPC who offers the mission */,
  "end_npc" INTEGER /* ID of the NPC who completes the mission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_start_npc FOREIGN KEY ("start_npc") REFERENCES npcs ("npc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_end_npc FOREIGN KEY ("end_npc") REFERENCES npcs ("npc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_reputation_id FOREIGN KEY ("reputation_id") REFERENCES reputations ("reputation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_faction_id FOREIGN KEY ("faction_id") REFERENCES factions ("faction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factions" (
  "faction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faction */,
  "faction_name" TEXT /* Name of the faction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the faction */,
  "reputation_thresholds" TEXT /* Reputation thresholds for different levels within the faction */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the faction's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of the reward (e.g., Surveyor's Notes, Credits) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the reward */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value or rarity of the reward */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the reward */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the reward's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reputations" (
  "reputation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reputation item */,
  "reputation_name" TEXT /* Name of the reputation item */,
  "reputation_type" TEXT /* Type of the reputation (e.g., Purple, Blue) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reputation item */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value or rarity of the reputation item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the reputation item's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reputation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "planet" TEXT /* Planet where the location is situated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the location's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "faction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's chosen faction */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the player */,
  "total_reputation" INTEGER /* Total reputation points earned by the player */,
  "guild_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guild the player is a member of */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., ACTIVE, INACTIVE) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the player's account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the player's last login */,
  "total_xp" INTEGER /* Total experience points earned by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_guild_id FOREIGN KEY ("guild_id") REFERENCES guilds ("guild_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_faction_id FOREIGN KEY ("faction_id") REFERENCES factions ("faction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_missions" (
  "player_mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-mission record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who completed the mission */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission completed */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the mission was completed */,
  "reward_collected" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the reward has been collected */,
  "xp_earned" INTEGER /* Experience points earned from the mission */,
  "reputation_earned" INTEGER /* Reputation points earned from the mission */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_missions_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_missions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guilds" (
  "guild_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guild */,
  "guild_name" TEXT /* Name of the guild */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who leads the guild */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the guild */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the guild was created */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the guild's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guild_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_guilds" (
  "player_guild_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-guild relationship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "guild_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guild */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the guild */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player in the guild (e.g., MEMBER, LEADER) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_guild_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_guilds_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_guilds_guild_id FOREIGN KEY ("guild_id") REFERENCES guilds ("guild_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "npcs" (
  "npc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NPC */,
  "npc_name" TEXT /* Name of the NPC */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the NPC is situated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the NPC */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the NPC's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("npc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_npcs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
